title: calamagrostis laricina
intro: Calamagrostis laricina, also known as cattail rush or laricina, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Calamagrostis laricina include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Calamagrostis laricina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to treat skin conditions and wounds.
